settings.title: Creative Zoo Originals
settings.text: The foundational pieces built around the iconic Creative Zoo marks. Everyday staples, versatile fits, and the visual language that started the world.

settings.title: Instincts
settings.text: Animal identity apparel and story signals for Panda, Lion, Wolf, Rabbit, Goat, Capybara, and future Creative Zoo identities.

settings.title: Where Creatures Rep Colors
settings.text: Gear for fans who carry their teams everywhere, from stadium noise to everyday movement, with pride built into the fit.

settings.heading: The whole Zoo, connected.
settings.subheading: A living home for Creative Zoo drops, collections, stories, and community energy. Start with the world, then move through every corner of the brand.
settings.footer_text: This page can grow with new chapters, seasonal campaigns, collaborations, and story-led collection pages while keeping the storefront path clear for shopping.
